description: Tan shaggy dog brown ribbon — sewing and restuffing.
itemDetails:
This tan shaggy dog plush with brown ribbon is a classic gift-plush dog style from mainstream retail lines in the 1990s onward. Ribbon-collar presentation is common in non-licensed plush intended for general gifting rather than character collecting.

Construction generally uses long-pile polyester fabric, polyester stuffing, and stitched or safety eye details. Market value is usually modest unless the sewn-in label identifies a premium plush house or a limited seasonal release.
